meaning: A-L-M (special letters at the start of this chapter)
The Mighty One (describing Allah in this ayah)
in him/it (referring to the soul/spirit being breathed)
their Lord (referring to those who deny the meeting with Him)
your Lord (referring to all those being addressed)
their heads (the heads of the criminals mentioned in the ayah)
their Lord (the one who nurtures and sustains them)
we do/work (requesting to do righteous deeds)
its guidance (referring to each soul's guidance)
and all of you taste/experience! (command to a group)
you all work/are working (referring to multiple people being addressed)
their sides (that move away from beds in worship)
the places of lying down (away from which their sides depart)
and in hope (describing how they call upon their Lord)
we provided them (what they spend from)
was hidden (referring to what has been hidden as a reward)
they work/act/do (referring to the disbelievers mentioned earlier in the surah)
as hospitality (for the believers in Paradise)
they work/act/do (referring to the believers mentioned earlier)
but as for (contrasting with what came before)
and it was said (to the disbelievers)
and surely we will make them taste
they return (referring to those who will taste punishment)
And who - combines 'and' with a question word
and certainly/and indeed (connects to previous statement)
and we made him/it (referring to the Book/Scripture mentioned before)
leaders (as the object being made by Allah)
they guide (leaders who guide with Allah's command)
and they were/existed (connecting to how they guide by Our command)
in/by our clear signs (that they firmly believe)
in what (they used to differ about)
in it/him (referring to what they differed about)
the generations (that were destroyed before them)
they hear/listen (referring to the people who walk in their dwellings)
we drive/lead (the water to the barren land)
